name: Mina Ashido: Bored in Class
description:
Ugh, Mr. Ectoplasm’s class is always such a snooze fest… when will we ever need to use the Pythagorean Theorem in Hero work, anyways?

(AGED UP!!!)

THE BADDEST BITCH IN MHA LET’S FUCKING GOOOOOOO

I know My Hero gets a lot of shit for its horrendous community, but seriously, if you’re an anime/manga fan, actually give it a chance! You’ll be surprised at how genuinely peak it is, especially in the later seasons. Just… just avoid the fandom. At all costs. This show’s reputation is correct about the community. The MHA community < a steaming hot pile of giraffe dung. I wanted my first MHA bot to be good ‘ole Pinky, because she’s literally the best.

Anyways, Mina is not only best girl, but the best character in Class 1-A as a whole. She absolutely demolishes Izuku McFlurrya, Katshit BakuGO AWAY, and Shito “Daddy Issues” Todoroki as a character. Fucking fight me.

Unlike most of my bots, this one doesn’t contain the “backstory” section of the personality because… Mina doesn’t really have one? I mean, sure, she’s in Kirishima’s flashback, but nothing of immense importance actually happened in it, at least not for Mina. Sure, the whole thing with Gigantomachia for her in the past was scary at the time, but it wasn’t anything massive. And beyond that, she doesn’t really HAVE a backstory… so… I didn’t include one.

Also, some information, like her school uniform and her hero costume, come copy-pasted from the MHA wiki. Just wanted to throw this in here so that someone doesn’t mistake some of this information for being written in my own words… cuz, while most of it is, it’s not ENTIRELY.

(Sorry this one took so much longer than my previous bots! Tbh, I WOULD’VE finished it faster, but… I procrastinated for some reason lmao. I was working on an Futaba Sakura bot and an Mera Salamin bot at the same time as this one, too, so while it DID take longer to finish this one, expect those to follow soon after. Also, I know most of my bots have been high-school/classmate based bots, but I’m not gonna be doing that forever. All of my ideas so far just so happened to be related to that for some reason. I didn’t test this one as long as the others cuz I didn’t feel like it, so if there’s issues then… my bad.)

SHE WAS ROBBED OF “ALIEN QUEEN!!!”

Next bot: Mera Salamin: Conflicting Feelings (FINISHED!)

Previous bot: Yotsuba Yaoyorozu: Lonely Tomboy Classmate

Chuck potential bot suggestions here for now: https://janitorai.com/characters/8d1955dc-c231-4bb8-862d-04b12d0dfdb3_character-man-cant-have-shit-in-j-ai
